executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Whole-stack certification blocked by external owner-loop residue: marketing independent verification fail-closed on stale outcome evidence.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable primary-repo outcome evidence before whole-stack certification.

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification fails closed because primary-repo adoption is measurement-pending; artifact age is 1798 minutes against a 240-minute max.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology is clean: 25/25 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 errors
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection shows a clean runtime surface with no disabled jobs and zero live errors. Previous internal-linking-watchdog delivery error remains cleared.
findings.root_cause: Topology is coherent with no live error surface.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green; docs agentic review mustFix resolved (7→0)
findings.mechanism: Loop integrity, health-monitor blocker localization, and shared market-intelligence consumption remain coherent. Docs agentic review mustFix repeat_count=7 has been resolved this run — ralph_agentic_latest.json now shows mustFix=0, status=pass, loopHealthy=True.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; docs escalation that was tracked in prior runs has been resolved by the docs owner loop.

findings.title: Persisted disabled jobs remain history only, not live runtime blockers
findings.mechanism: Disabled entries still exist in jobs.json history, but live Gateway topology currently exposes zero disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Historical scheduler records persist after live job removal/disable cleanup.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed the audit against the current live view: 25 enabled jobs, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 live last-errors. Clean topology persists.
Architecture-owned gates remain green. No architecture-side repairs were required this run; the only red remains external (marketing outcome evidence).

Confirmed docs agentic review mustFix is now 0 (was repeat_count=7 in prior runs). ralph_agentic_latest.json shows status=pass, loopHealthy=True, mustFix=[]. Escalation to ralph-workflow-docs-verifier-supervisor owner loop succeeded.

Health monitor (2026-06-03 20:39) still reports docs_agentic_review as an issue, but the latest ralph_agentic_latest.json (2026-06-03 21:06) shows resolved. This is a natural sync gap — the health monitor will catch up on its next run. Architecture watchdog correctly does not cross into health-monitor repair.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the architecture verifier path is green, live topology is clean (25/25 enabled, 0 errors), loop integrity passes, shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable, and docs agentic review mustFix has been resolved by its owner loop.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on Codeberg-primary outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are coherent, but marketing independent verification still fails closed because primary-repo movement is measurement-pending (artifact age: 1798 min).

runtime_assertions.health_monitor_docs_sync_note: Health monitor (20:39) reports docs_agentic_review issues; ralph_agentic_latest.json (21:06) shows resolved with mustFix=0. This is a natural sync gap.

notes: Architecture green here means the architecture-owned verifier path is coherent; it does not mean the whole stack is green.
Live disabled jobs are 0; live last-error count is 0 (internal-linking-watchdog delivery error cleared in prior run, still clear).
Independent live inspection: 25 total, 25 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 last_error.
The remaining blocker is external marketing outcome evidence, not architecture runtime drift.

No architecture-side repairs were needed this run.
